review_title: Building an App Without Coding Has Never Been This Easy!
description: Overall, I had a very positive experience. Being able to publish my own mobile app without any technical background was a big win. It’s a great solution for beginners and small businesses looking to go mobile fast.
author: Uğur İ.
pros: The platform is extremely user-friendly and requires no coding skills. The drag-and-drop interface makes building an app quick and easy. Also, the support team is very responsive and helpful.
cons: Some advanced features are only available in paid plans. It would be great to have more flexibility with third-party integrations.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: Mustafa A.
pros: You can create your own application in a very nice and professional way without knowing code. Also, customer service and support is very fast and very friendly. Flawless
cons: You notify them of the features you want to be developed and added. They are working on this feature quickly. Perfect!
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: NO support, POOR performance speed of platform, PATHETIC - stay away!!!!
description: TERRIBLE, PATHETIC....no replies for mails to support. Even if the Login page doesnt work, no one bothers to even reply to emails!!!
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: NOTHING, just hopeless product with NO support
cons: The platform to bulid the mobile app, just crawls all the time, at snail pace. Notifications dont work at all. Bugs dont get fixed and support doesnt respond or reply to issues. There is NO support at all. Please stay away from this platform. Not worth even a penny.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: Easy and fast way to make apps without coding!
description: The new apps I create will push my small business to the next level by getting the products and promotions out to subscribers immediately and increase revenue. I am new to Mobiroller, so I am just now implementing the apps, and am anticipating the apps to increase my business.
author: Pam G.
pros: OMG!!! Yes, yes, and yes!!! I have always wanted to create apps! Right off the top of my head, I can name 15 that I've had in the idea tank and ready to roll, but I haven't because it was too complex. -1st and foremost, you had me at 'create an app with NO CODE'! -I love the simplicity of the dashboard and the checklist that actually strikes through the task to let you know what is still needed to be done on the app creation. -There is a lot of templates that give you a great start, and you can EASILY change them as you need to. -The amount of flexibility and choices of content that you can add is fabulous. -On the Road Map, I can't wait until you have the Reservation and Appointment Module! For one of the apps I want to create, this will be golden for the services I provide to indie authors. -There are way too many great features to name. Thank you for creating this program! I started off by signing up for FREE and created an app in less than 5 minutes(Yay!!!)
cons: The only thing I'm nervous about is wanting to make so many apps that I could spend all my time building and rolling them out that I wouldn't do anything else with my day.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Much better than anything I encountered before
description: I am happy that I met this product/company. I was searching for an affordable but powerful App builder for quite some time. In addition to their solid product, they helped with any doubts I encountered on my way. Thanks a lot!
author: Philip F.
pros: The feature set is pretty impressive. I like the various different content types - compared to alternative App builders, these are actually useful and well elaborated.
cons: The UI (of both app builder and templates) could be improved. However, it is still very well possible to build beautifully designed apps. Thus, this is rather a minor criticism.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: See a Potential to be the leader in no code app development if they can tie up few things
description: Overall I feel the Mobiroller as a no-code app development platform has a potential to grow and be a leader in the space but to achieve that they need to focus on the quicker delivery of features. In terms of potential I would rate 5 but considering where I see them at currently its 4.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Has lot of features as a part of no-code modules which can be used to create some advanced apps like shopping app, membership app with chat features etc. Another plus point I feel is their Reseller feature with Access Management and whitelabel (planned in future)
cons: Their pre built templates are pretty average and limited. Being a no-code platform templates are very important to jump into app development. Hope they add better and more templates soon. Another thing I least like about is they don't have any way to link different pages like If on one page I want to give a link of my other page so that user can jump to that page directly without going though menu and that way I can give better UX then its not possible at the moment. Additionally I would like them explore possibility of having variables and webhooks functionality which would take their platform on next level.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Helps build multiple apps and saves lot of time.
author: Dinesh N.
pros: Mobiroller has totally changed the way I build my mobile apps for ecommerce and beyond. I used to spend hours coding complicated apps, but now, with Mobiroller, I can build and customize my own mobile apps with no coding experience in no time. It's an absolute game changer! Plus, their customer service is top-notch. Highly recommend Mobiroller to anyone looking for a code-free mobile app builder!
cons: Nothing as such, as few important things are already there on their roadmap.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Make apps for your business and clients in a way that is simple and fast
description: Easy to use and fast. If you want to get an app up and running without coding mobiroller will help. Great app builder.
author: Khushna S.
pros: It is very simple to make great apps for your business as well as your clients businesses with their reseller plan. The app builder integrates with shopiroller, mobiroller's partner companies sister product.
cons: Mobiroller is developing templates and connectors. They are still a newish company so it will be interesting to see how they grow. Both mobiroller and shopiroller look great however.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best tool to create Mobile app
description: I got the MobiRoller after searching for a long time to making an app without coding knowledge. The knowledge on how to use it and make changes is more than enough to create an app. It's awesome for the people like me who are not expert in coding and needs to create apps.
author: Nazlin M.
pros: I was able to create a good android app without any coding knowledge. It's a very useful method to share the link to download the APK file rather than sending the APK file.
cons: I could not find any big cons in MobiRoller but the only point I would say I dislike is, getting some time to process after clicking any update or save.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: To build my app for Android phone any thing
cons: Free site to participate any website bulder
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: Company support is provided to the user quickly.
author: Abdullah D.
pros: I see the application as the biggest advantage because it is done without requiring coding information
cons: We should be able to provide options for module development and contribute to the application by drag-and-drop method if necessary.(Find icon, Home icon, etc.) Getting feedback from the system about the implementation of the proposed modules is progressing slowly, which leads to the opinion that it is a waste of time and the needs cannot be met.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

author: Ferhat S.
pros: Catalogue and notification and fast connecting
cons: Nothing all controls is good and perfectly working
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

description: So far its been awesome and it excites me to build apps
author: Kavir G.
pros: The first no code app builder that I purchased was Beezer and it is good but Mobiroller is on another level!!!The limits they are very generous, I love the ability to monetize the app and personally the new IPTV function. They constantly bring in new features and support is awesome.Lots of potential and now they have Shopify module which is so exciting.Keep up the great work guys!!!
cons: I would like to see more templates but other than that it is an overall solid platform for those who wants to have apps without coding.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

description: So far my experience with Mobiroller has been very positive. We are very happy with the service we are getting, even though it is delayed. With us be in the USA, there is a 7 hour time difference with Mobiroller support, so sometimes it takes a while to get answers, but this is no fault of theirs, just simply geographic locations. Based upon our current experience, I can see us being customers with Mobiroller for many years to come.
author: Bryan M.
pros: After researching a number of app building websites, I selected Mobiroller based upon the features it offered, the ease of use, and the value for what we paid. Being able to use the backend dashboard to add and edit features is definitely a plus, and have these changes sideloaded into the app. That way the end users do not have to continually download app updates.
cons: I wish there was better documentation for some of the modules as to what their features and limitations are. Most of the modules can be figured out by working with them, but would be nice to have some details.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I wanted to create an app as a guide to help newbies learn the essence of yoga from the basics. MobiRoller helped me to construct my almost anti-app app. They understood my vision and helped me to get there. With a special shout out to Damla and Fevzi- I would recommend this company.
author: Teri G.
pros: Mostly, this software really allows you to create an app from scratch. Once you understand how to navigate it changes and design is pretty easy.
cons: Once I got to where I thought my app was ready to launch, turned out there was a lot left to do that I was unable to do. For those pieces, the MobiRoller team of experts took over and made it happen and they were great!! Interfacing with AppleStore was the toughest, but MobiRoller knew what to do and made sure my app was launched and functioning!
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

author: ferhat K.
pros: Especially Turkey Antalya Teknokent Mobirolelr team [SENSITIVE CONTENT], ÖyküI would like to thank Ms. and the technical team for their help. I am grateful.I am grateful and thank you very much
cons: There is nothing missing, whatever problem I had, the problem was solved
